programme.title: Live: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: The West second round Game 2 gets underway as the Wild take on the Avalanche at Ball Arena. Colorado leads the series after a 9-6 win. Cale Makar scored twice and Devon Toews had a goal and three assists, while Nathan MacKinnon also netted a goal.

programme.title: The National
programme.desc: CBC's flagship nightly news program, featuring the day's top stories with in-depth and original journalism; Adrienne Arsenault and Ian Hanomansing anchor.

programme.title: Live: CBC Toronto News at 11
programme.desc: The host presents information about the social, economic and political issues of the day and provides updates on current events in Toronto.

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Sarah quizzes Danielle about Theo's violent streak and Bernie hears news of Mal's plans.

programme.title: Run the Burbs
programme.desc: A group of raccoons distracts Andrew from his school work; Camille and Barb team up to catch a graffiti bandit; Ramesh struggles to understand Khia's connection to Pride.

programme.title: Son of a Critch
programme.desc: Mark takes directing the school play too seriously and finds himself without a cast and crew; Mark stubbornly tries to perform the play alone but realizes he's not a one-man-show.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Kate plays detective after finding a mysterious phone number in Nathan's pocket; Anne's explosive personality lands her in anger management; Sloane's ultrasound appointment goes a little too well.

programme.title: Sort Of
programme.desc: A family crisis causes Sabi to confront unresolved feelings towards their father.

programme.title: One More Time
programme.desc: Celebrating his three-week anniversary with a new fling, DJ must come to terms with the true nature of his relationship while dining in the dark.

programme.title: Halifax Comedy Festival
programme.desc: Host Mark Critch welcomes standup comics Matt Wright, Alonzo Bodden, Sophie Buddle and Pete Johansson.

programme.title: This Hour Has 22 Minutes
programme.desc: "Antiques Roadshow Canada" is coming to check out; starring Aba Amuquandoh, Stacey McGunnigle, Trent McClellan, Chris Wilson and Mark Critch.

programme.desc: CBC's flagship nightly news program, featuring the day's top stories with in-depth and original journalism; Adrienne Arsenault and Ian Hanomansing anchor.

programme.desc: The Eraser is erasing letters from street signs in Reader Valley and now the cars don't know what to do.

programme.desc: Bo and Jane are taken out of their element on a visit to Dino Island, and the kids must save them from the island's predators.
